description: Composition Blue round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, and graphic with rubber print on the front Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash with warm water Do not bleach Tumble dry Warm iron Do not dry clean Revel in effortless contemporary fashion with this Levi's T-shirt that Sports the brand name on the front in rubber print. Tailored to a beautiful finish, this tee is designed to offer a snug Fit and flaunt your chiseled body. Slip into a pair of black jeans and sneakers to complement this trendy tee. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
